arts.ttl: Liverpool star Jurgen Klopp called “exceptional” is not in Arne Slot’s future plans
arts.sum: Liverpool appointed new manager Arne Slot after Jurgen Klopp’s departure in the summer transfer window. The club made changes this summer at the top and in the squad, with the new manager stamping his authority and making decisions according to his philosophy. arts.ttl: Arne Slot must unleash potent weapon loved by Mikel Arteta to give Liverpool edge over rivals
arts.sum: Liverpool enjoyed plenty of set-piece success at the San Siro but they should be aiming to score more goals using the tactic

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa gets Liverpool boost Darwin Nunez and Cody Gakpo weren't allowed
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa made his Liverpool debut in Tuesday's 3-1 win against AC Milan in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Liverpool have already moved on from Martin Zubimendi transfer snub as new star emerges
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi was a player Liverpool were desperate to sign in the summer, and he is likely to still be on their radar even after his high profile snub

arts.ttl: 'He has absolutely deserved this': Iraola on Adam Smith's contract extension
arts.sum: Adam Smith deserved his contract extension as he continues to impress Andoni Iraola in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool rampage prompted brutal sacking of shell-shocked manager 25 days into new season
arts.sum: Liverpool put in a commanding display which had huge implications for a former Premier League manager

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man Utd to go head-to-head in transfer battle for Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United are on a collision course as they both seek long-term replacements for their respective left-backs, according to reports. arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott sends one-word Liverpool message as injury update given
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to be without Harvey Elliott for a period of time with a fractured foot

arts.ttl: Liverpool identify exciting four man shortlist as they plan for life without Van Dijk
arts.sum: Liverpool have identified four centre backs as possible replacements for Virgil van Dijk according to reports with uncertainty surrounding the Dutchman’s future. Van Dijk is one of three key players out of contract at the end of season, along with Trent Alexander-Arnold and Mohamed Salah. arts.ttl: Liverpool fans stopped in their tracks as goalkeeper Alisson sports brand-new look
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson has been a key player since his arrival from Italian giants Roma in 2018 but will look slightly different on his next outing for the club after opting for a new look
